description: Myocardial infarction with coronary microvascular dysfunction
notes: New code added to capture MI with coronary microvascular dysfunction, distinct from traditional obstructive coronary artery disease.

description: Chronic migraine without aura, not intractable
notes: New code to better classify chronic migraine presentation separate from episodic migraine.

description: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic noncirrhotic hepatopathy
notes: New code addressing metabolic-associated fatty liver disease in Type 2 diabetes, reflecting evolving understanding of hepatic complications.
New code for unspecified depression to capture cases where a more specific diagnosis has not been established.
Description revised to align with updated clinical terminology for long COVID conditions.
New specificity added for low back pain coding to differentiate from site-unspecified dorsalgia.
New code specifically for vertebrogenic low back pain, distinct from nonspecific low back pain.
New code for low back pain not classified elsewhere.
Deleted in favor of codes with 7th character extension for encounter type.
New code added to classify social cognition deficits as a distinct cognitive domain.
Revised description for clarity; previously described as encounter for screening for depression in adults.
Added to provide unspecified CKD stage 3 code when substage (3a/3b) is not documented.
New specificity code for CKD stage 3a (GFR 45-59 mL/min).
New specificity code for CKD stage 3b (GFR 30-44 mL/min).

description: Visit complexity inherent to evaluation and management associated with medical care services that serve as the continuing focal point for all needed health care services
notes: Add-on code for visit complexity. Effective January 1, 2024 after being delayed from 2021. Can only be reported with office/outpatient E/M codes 99202-99215.

description: Prolonged office or other outpatient evaluation and management service(s) beyond the total time for the primary service; each additional 15 minutes
notes: New prolonged services add-on code replacing previous 993X0 codes. Report with 99205 or 99215 only.
Revised payment amount and coverage criteria for the current vaccine season.

description: Syringe with needle, sterile, 1 cc or less, each
notes: Fee schedule rate update for 2025.
Deleted. Replaced with specific compounded drug codes. Use J7350 or appropriate specific drug code.

description: Osteogenesis stimulator, electrical, noninvasive, other than spinal applications
notes: Consolidated into E0748 for all noninvasive bone growth stimulators.

description: Unilateral inguinal hernia, without obstruction or gangrene, not specified as recurrent
notes: Revised inclusion notes and coding guidelines to improve specificity of hernia laterality documentation.
New code specifically for exercise-induced bronchospasm, previously coded under other asthma categories.
Additional 7th character requirements added for ulcer depth and laterality.

description: Secondary malignant neoplasm of unspecified kidney and renal pelvis
notes: New code for metastatic disease to kidney, improving specificity over previous C79.0 code.

description: Secondary malignant neoplasm of right kidney and renal pelvis
notes: Laterality-specific code for right kidney metastasis.

description: Secondary malignant neoplasm of left kidney and renal pelvis
notes: Laterality-specific code for left kidney metastasis.

description: Electrical stimulation, unattended, for wound healing
notes: Deleted. Use G0281 for attended electrical stimulation or appropriate E/M code with wound care.
New code for retinal ischemia to improve specificity for retinal vascular conditions.

description: Diabetes mellitus due to underlying condition with diabetic autonomic (poly)neuropathy
notes: New code for autonomic neuropathy secondary to underlying condition-related diabetes.
New code for abdominal compartment syndrome, a recognized complication in critical care settings.
